output.summary: Three targeted fixes: (1) Change light-mode resource/policy card backgrounds from bg-white to bg-off-white so they blend with the page background rather than appearing as bright white cards. (2) Add cursor-pointer to all filter pill buttons and Clear All buttons. (3) Fix the Load More btn-secondary hover state in light mode -- the btn-secondary gradient animation background is transparent before it sweeps in, showing the off-white page through the button. Add an explicit Archive.css override to ensure a visible hover background for the Load More button in light mode.

fileChanges.description: Change light-mode card background from bg-white to bg-off-white
fileChanges.details: On the article element (line 15), change `bg-white` to `bg-off-white`. The full conditional classes become: `dark:bg-charcoal bg-off-white`. This makes the card background match the page's off-white (#FBF6E2) instead of standing out as bright white (#FFFFFF).

fileChanges.description: Change light-mode card background from bg-white to bg-off-white
fileChanges.details: On the article element (line 13), change `bg-white` to `bg-off-white`. Same rationale as card-resource.php.

fileChanges.description: Add cursor-pointer to filter pill buttons and Clear All buttons
fileChanges.details: Three locations need cursor-pointer added to their class attributes: (1) Active filter pill buttons at line 310 -- add `cursor-pointer` to the class string `inline-flex items-center gap-1 border border-current rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-body-small uppercase font-medium tracking-wider`. (2) Form-level Clear All button at line 279 -- add `cursor-pointer` to the class string `text-body-small uppercase font-medium tracking-wider`. (3) Active-filters Clear All button at line 301 -- add `cursor-pointer` to the class string `order-last text-body-small ml-auto uppercase font-medium tracking-wider`.

fileChanges.description: Add cursor-pointer to dynamically created filter pill buttons
fileChanges.details: In the buildButtons() function (around line 288), the insertAdjacentHTML call constructs pill button markup with a class string. Add `cursor-pointer` to that class string so dynamically created pills (from AJAX filtering) also show pointer cursor. The class should become: `inline-flex items-center gap-1 border border-current rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-body-small uppercase font-medium tracking-wider cursor-pointer`.

fileChanges.description: Fix Load More button hover state -- ensure visible background on hover in light mode

designDecisions.question: Should resource/policy cards use bg-off-white instead of bg-white in light mode?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes. The page background is off-white (#FBF6E2). Using bg-off-white for the cards makes them blend seamlessly with the page, relying on the border (border-charcoal/10) for card definition rather than a contrasting white fill. This is the user's explicit request.
designDecisions.evidence: User feedback: 'On the post cards (resource/policy) where the background is white when in light mode, change it to off-white.'

designDecisions.question: Should filter pills use cursor-pointer?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes. All interactive buttons in the filter area (filter pills, Clear All buttons) should show pointer cursor on hover to indicate interactivity. These are <button> elements which default to cursor:default in browsers.
designDecisions.evidence: User feedback: 'When hovering over a filter pill, make the cursor become a pointer.'

designDecisions.question: How should the Load More button look on hover in light mode?
designDecisions.recommendation: The btn-secondary gradient sweep animation should provide a neon-green-to-blue gradient fill on hover. If the animation fails or is not visually distinct enough, a solid gradient fallback should be applied. The button should always have charcoal border + charcoal text on hover, with a visible gradient background fill -- never transparent/white on the off-white page. Apply an explicit gradient background as CSS fallback in Archive.css scoped to `.archive:not(.dark) .archive-load-more .btn-secondary:hover`.
designDecisions.evidence: User feedback: 'The load more button is still white on white on hover.' The btn-secondary's hover gradient animation (btn-gradient-sweep-secondary) is not producing a visible result against the off-white background.

qaChecklist: Verify light-mode resource cards have off-white background (matching page), not bright white
Verify light-mode policy cards have off-white background (matching page), not bright white
Verify dark-mode resource/policy cards still have charcoal background (unchanged)
Verify resource/policy card hover still transitions to accent fill in both modes
Verify filter pill buttons show cursor:pointer on hover
Verify Clear All buttons show cursor:pointer on hover
Verify AJAX-created filter pills also show cursor:pointer on hover
Verify Load More button in light mode: visible gradient background on hover, not transparent/white
Verify Load More button in dark mode: existing white-filled behavior unchanged (blog xl)
Verify Load More button standard behavior: charcoal border + charcoal text on hover in light mode
